message:
refactor(runtime,combinator,sync): streamline lock handling and reduce verbosity

- circuit_breaker.rs: simplify lock-poison expect patterns, reduce boilerplate
- rate_limit.rs: tighten lock handling consistency
- bridge.rs: align distributed bridge lock/expect style with codebase standards
- three_lane.rs: major condensation of verbose lock().expect() calls (-76 net lines)
- worker.rs: simplify worker lock acquisition patterns
- pool.rs: standardize sync pool lock-poison handling

Continues the lock-poison handling standardization from 85496686 and the
three_lane scheduler refactor from 79af9500, extending the cleanup across
the combinator, distributed, and sync modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -713,7 +713,10 @@ impl RegionBridge {
             children: self.local.child_ids(),
             finalizer_count: self.local.finalizer_count() as u32,
             budget: self.local.budget().to_distributed(),
-            cancel_reason: self.local.cancel_reason().map(|r| r.kind.as_str().to_owned()),
+            cancel_reason: self
+                .local
+                .cancel_reason()
+                .map(|r| r.kind.as_str().to_owned()),
             parent: self.local.parent,
             metadata: vec![],
         }
